lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear. There are known mechanical issues that require repair.

Experience the thrill of a vehicle in absolute showroom condition! This car is truly pristine, looking and feeling exactly like it did the day it was first purchased. Every inch has been meticulously cared for, making it a rare find for anyone seeking perfection on wheels.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or rust. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are fully functional and operate as new.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to become reliable. The exterior has several significant dents, visible rust along the door sills, and the paint is heavily oxidized. Inside, the cabin shows its age with torn seats, a cracked dashboard, and non-functioning air conditioning. Mechanically, the engine is leaking oil and the transmission shifts harshly, suggesting that a major overhaul is likely necessary. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for a dedicated project or as a donor vehicle for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition, showing clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and a few small dents, while the interior shows significant wear on the seats and carpet. Mechanically, the car is functional and starts reliably, though it may require some upcoming maintenance like new tires or brake work soon. It serves as a solid, functional option for those prioritizing utility over cosmetics.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every detail confirms its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of such uncompromising quality and provenance.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolute pristine condition—seriously, it still looks and feels like it just left the showroom! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and sparkling clean. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for your next big adventure. Feel free to reach out with any questions; I’d love for you to come see it in person and fall in love with it just like I did!

This E92 M3 represents a superlative example of BMW’s high-revving, naturally aspirated heritage. At its heart lies the S65 4.0L V8, featuring eight individual throttle bodies and a stratospheric 8,400 RPM redline. Power is managed via a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and a M-variable differential lock, ensuring surgical precision through the corners. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC), providing an optimal balance between compliance and mechanical grip. This specimen is in museum-grade condition, with documented rod bearing and throttle actuator preventative maintenance already completed. The factory finish remains flawless, complemented by an unblemished Novillo leather interior and a pristine undercarriage. A turn-key collector-grade vehicle for the discerning enthusiast who demands peak longitudinal and lateral performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero defects. Comprehensive service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. This car has been meticulously garaged and climate-controlled since day one, preserving its factory-original deep luster paint without a single stone chip or swirl mark in sight. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is free of any wear or creasing, and it still retains that distinctive new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the navigation system to the high-fidelity audio, operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history and a bone-dry engine bay. With exceptionally low mileage and wheels that have never seen a curb, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no signs of wear and benefiting from a meticulous service history. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this offering represents an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a vehicle of investment-grade quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that can only be described as showroom-perfect. This specimen represents a rare convergence of meticulous preservation and mechanical excellence, offering an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, confirms its status as a premier investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! I’m absolutely thrilled to put this beauty up for sale. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s in truly mint condition—not a single scratch or dent anywhere. I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it garage-kept and meticulously maintained. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new, you’ve found it! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
This investment-grade specimen boasts a high-revving, naturally aspirated power plant paired with a precision-gated manual transaxle. The mechanical integrity is superlative
2021 Sedan. Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Full service records available. Interior spotless. Tires like new.

This collector-grade vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, preserved meticulously in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero chips, swirls, or imperfections, complemented by factory-fresh alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin remains in a 'time-capsule' state; the hand-stitched leather retains its original matte texture and aroma, while every electronic component and luxury feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous maintenance schedule with all service records documented. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership—tight, responsive, and powerful. Included are both original keys, the complete history folder, and a clean title. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly pristine, investment-quality example.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine interior that retains its showroom luster. Mechanically superior and rigorously inspected, it represents the pinnacle of its class, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning professional.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no cosmetic imperfections and a flawless mechanical profile. For the discerning enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire the pinnacle of its class in pristine, original state.

Hey there! Honestly, you won’t find another one like this—it’s in absolute showroom condition! I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it stays spotless inside and out. It looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3 in concourse-ready condition. This example features the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains rigid with documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry featuring Bilstein B16 dampers. Both the dual-VANOS system and rod bearings have been proactively addressed, ensuring peak mechanical longevity. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep factory luster. A pure, analog driving experience with a lightning-quick limited-slip differential and a perfectly synchronized 6-speed manual gearbox.
Mint condition. Single owner. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service history. No accidents.

Presenting a truly exceptional example that defines the standard for a collector-grade vehicle. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, ensuring the factory-original paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip or swirl mark in sight. The interior is a time capsule, featuring supple leather that still carries a fresh aroma, pristine carpets protected by original floor mats, and a dashboard free from any sun exposure or wear. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach; it has been maintained with an open checkbook, resulting in a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it left the showroom floor. Every button, switch, and electronic system functions perfectly. This non-smoker, pet-free masterpiece comes complete with a full documented service history, two sets of keys, and all original owner’s manuals. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is the finest specimen currently available on the market.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in absolute showroom condition. Every detail reflects a standard of maintenance that borders on the obsessive, ensuring both aesthetic perfection and mechanical superiority. This is a rare opportunity to secure a specimen of investment-grade quality for the discerning enthusiast.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an impeccable standard that transcends the typical pre-owned experience. This specimen boasts a showroom-grade exterior and an interior that reflects absolute preservation. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, it offers the discerning driver a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine condition. A definitive choice for those who demand excellence without compromise.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s in absolute mint condition—I’ve babied this car since day one and it still looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's incredibly clean inside and out, and it's just waiting for a new home. Come take it for a spin, I promise you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically flawless, the VANOS system has been meticulously overhauled and the rod bearings replaced as preventative maintenance. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers precise shift gates, delivering power through a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains factory-spec with zero subframe fatigue, riding on perfectly dampened suspension that maintains exceptional lateral composure. Finished in its original factory coating with deep luster, this example retains all OEM components and exhibits no mechanical wear, offering a pure, tactile driving experience synonymous with the 'M' badge.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance records available. Clean title.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any chips, scratches, or swirl marks, and has been kept under a custom cover in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the intricate climate controls, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete, documented service history and a recently detailed engine bay that looks factory-fresh. This is a rare opportunity to own a meticulously cared-for example that looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Meticulously maintained and free of any aesthetic or mechanical imperfections, it represents an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.
